com.pax.poslink.broadpos

Interface BroadPOSCommunicator.DetectAnyTimeListener

  • Enclosing class:
    BroadPOSCommunicator

    public static interface BroadPOSCommunicator.DetectAnyTimeListener
    Listener for detectAnyTime

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      static int STATE_HAS_INSERT_CACHE
      BroadPOS has insertAnyTime cache.
      static int STATE_HAS_SWIPE_CACHE
      BroadPOS has swipeAnyTime cache.
      static int STATE_NO_CACHE
      BroadPOS has no detect cache.

    • Method Detail

      • onDetectCacheChange

        void onDetectCacheChange(int state)
        Callback when Detect Cache changes.
        Parameters:
        state - STATE_NO_CACHE BroadPOS has no detect cache.
        STATE_HAS_INSERT_CACHE BroadPOS has insertAnyTime cache.
        STATE_HAS_SWIPE_CACHE BroadPOS has swipeAnyTime cache.

        Callback when an error occurs
        Parameters:
        code - see ResultConstant
        errorMsg - Error Message
